visuals.title: Intensity Slicing Process
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Intensity Slicing Process
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Pseudocolor Image Processing</text>
  
  <!-- Input Grayscale Image -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="100" height="100" fill="#E0E0E0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#333" opacity="0">
    Grayscale Image
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Intensity Values -->
  <rect x="50" y="170" width="100" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="190" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Intensity Values
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow to Processing -->
  <path d="M160 195 L190 195" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Color Mapping Process -->
  <rect x="190" y="170" width="100" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="240" y="195" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Color Mapping
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="240" y="210" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Function
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow to Output -->
  <path d="M290 195 L320 195" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Output Color Image -->
  <rect x="320" y="60" width="100" height="100" fill="url(#colorGradient)" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="370" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#333" opacity="0">
    Color Image
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Color Bar Legend -->
  <rect x="320" y="170" width="100" height="20" fill="url(#colorGradient)" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="320" y="195" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Low Intensity
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="395" y="195" text-anchor="end" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    High Intensity
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Intensity to Color Mapping -->
  <path d="M100 200 L190 200" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Defs for markers and gradients -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
    <linearGradient id="colorGradient" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#0000FF"/>
      <stop offset="25%" style="stop-color:#00FFFF"/>
      <stop offset="50%" style="stop-color:#00FF00"/>
      <stop offset="75%" style="stop-color:#FFFF00"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#FF0000"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
</svg>
